<style id="wp-custom-css">
.breadcrumb li {
	display: inline-block;
	list-style: none;
}

.breadcrumb li:not(:last-child)::after {
	content: "";
    display: inline-block;
    width: 5px;
    height: 5px;
    margin: -2px 10px 0 9px;
    vertical-align: middle;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border1);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--color-border1);
    transform: rotate(45deg);

<main id="main" class="main">

<article class="article">

    
<div class="jms-new-login-container">

    
    
    <div class="jms-new-login-header">
        <h1 class="jms-new-login-title">企業ログイン</h1>

        <div class="jms-new-login-form-section">
            <form method="post" action="https://www.joby.jp/wp-admin/admin-post.php">

                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="company_login_submit">
                <input type="hidden" name="_company_login_nonce" value="2f0593e825">
                <input type="hidden" name="redirect_to" value="">

                <div class="jms-new-form-row">
                    <label class="jms-new-form-label" for="company_id">企業ID</label>
                    <input type="text" id="company_id" name="company_id" class="jms-new-form-input" required>
                </div>

                <div class="jms-new-form-row">
                    <label class="jms-new-form-label" for="password">パスワード</label>
                    <input type="password" id="password" name="password" class="jms-new-form-input" required>
                </div>

                <div class="jms-new-button-row">
                    <button type="submit" class="jms-new-btn-login">ログイン</button>
                </div>

            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="jms-new-section">
        <div class="jms-new-link-row">
            <h2 class="jms-new-link-text">ID/パスワードを忘れた方はこちら</h2>
            <button type="button" class="button sp-width-fit" onclick="window.location.href='https://www.joby.jp/account-inquiry/'">問合せする</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="jms-new-section">
        <div class="jms-new-link-row">
            <h2 class="jms-new-link-text">登録がお済みでない場合</h2>
            <button type="button" class="button sp-width-fit" onclick="window.location.href='https://www.joby.jp/company-provisional-registration/'">詳細はこちら</button>
        </div>

        <div class="jms-new-description">
            企業登録をご利用頂くと、求人情報の掲載はもちろん、イベント情報の掲載や、本サイトに登録された有力な求職者を探したり、直接連絡を取ったりすることが可能になります。        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="jms-new-section">
        <div class="jms-new-link-row">
            <h2 class="jms-new-link-text">マニュアル</h2>
            <a href="https://www.joby.jp/wp-content/plugins/jms-forms/assets/documents/manual_company1_やまぐちジョブナビに登録.pdf" class="button" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">登録マニュアル</a>
        </div>
    </div>

</div>

</article>

<script>
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    $('#toggle-maintenance-mode').on('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        $.ajax({
            url: 'https://www.joby.jp/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
            method: 'POST',
            data: {
                action: 'toggle_maintenance_mode',
                _ajax_nonce: '678d79bbeb',
            },
            success: function(response) {
                if (response.success) {
                    // Display the message
                    const message = $('<div>', {
                        text: response.data.message,
                        css: {
                            position: 'fixed',
                            top: '50%',
                            left: '50%',
                            transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
                            background: '#323232',
                            color: '#fff',
                            padding: '20px 40px',
                            fontSize: '16px',
                            fontWeight: 'bold',
                            textAlign: 'center',
                            borderRadius: '8px',
                            boxShadow: '0px 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',
                            zIndex: 9999,
                        },
                    }).appendTo('body');

                    setTimeout(function() {
                        message.fadeOut(500, function() {
                            $(this).remove();
                            location
                                .reload(); // Reload the page after the message fades out
                        });
                    }, 3000);
                } else {
                    alert(response.data.message || 'An error occurred.');
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                alert('An unexpected error occurred.');
            },
        });
    });
});
</script>
